seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: The email should be at least eight sentences long but not exceed twelve sentences.
new_constraint: The email should include precisely three paragraphs, with each paragraph containing five sentences.
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. The email should be at least eight sentences long but not exceed twelve sentences. The email should include precisely three paragraphs, with each paragraph containing five sentences.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Upcoming Exhibitions at [Gallery Name]

Dear [Gallery Name] Team,

I am a great admirer of the exhibitions your gallery showcases. I have been following your programming for some time now. Your commitment to presenting diverse and thought-provoking art is truly impressive. I am particularly interested in contemporary and modern art movements. I was hoping you could provide me with information about what is scheduled soon.

Could you please share details about any upcoming exhibitions for the next few months? I would be very grateful if you could send me a catalog or a link to your current exhibition schedule. Knowing what is coming up would allow me to plan my visits accordingly. I especially enjoy discovering new artists featured in your space. Your collection always provides a wonderful cultural experience.

Thank you so much for your time and consideration regarding my request. I look forward to hearing from you at your earliest convenience. Please let me know if there is a specific person I should direct this inquiry to. I appreciate any information you can provide about future events. I hope to visit [Gallery Name] very soon.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]<turn|>
